Username must be 3-16 characters!: Username e tlameha ho ba litlhaku tse 3-16!

● At least 1 Lowercase Letter: ● Bonyane tlhaku e le 1 e Nyenyane
Password must be 8-16 characters!: Password e tlameha ho ba litlhaku tse 8-16!
Not your preferred language?: Ha se puo eo u e ratang?
Password must contain at least one symbo: Password e tlameha ho ba le bonyane letšoao le le leng!
● Username Length Must Be Between 3-16: ● Bolelele ba Lebitso la Mosebelisi e Tlameha ho ba Pakeng tsa 3-16
● Password Length Must Be Between 8-16: ● Bolelele ba Password e Tlameha ho ba Pakeng tsa 8-16
Already have an account?: Na u se u na le ak'haonte?
Password must contain at least one lower: Lekunutu le tlameha ho ba le bonyane tlhaku e le 'ngoe e nyane!
● At least 1 Uppercase Letter: ● Bonyane tlhaku e le 1 e kholo
Password must contain at least one numbe: Lekunutu le tlameha ho ba le bonyane nomoro e le 'ngoe!
